text:
## Weekly Update - 2026-03-29

Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, 86 PRs merged this week. We ripped out some marketing copy, added a ridiculous amount of models, and rewired how pollen flows.

🤖 **The Frontier Model Avalanche**
- Added Alibaba Qwen (text, vision, image). `qwen-large` and `qwen-vision` are on the free tier.
- Amazon Nova model family is live.
- xAI upgrades: Grok text moved to Azure, plus official xAI image and video models.
- Added `wan-fast` (Wan 2.2) as a free-tier video model.

💧 **Hourly Drips & Fairer Upgrades**
- All tiers now get hourly pollen refills. No more waiting forever if you burn through your stack.
- Spore-to-Seed upgrades are now fairer, using GitHub ID lookups and spread across 42 slots.
- App submissions are now open to all tiers. The bot won't reject you anymore.

🔑 **Headless Auth & BYOP Visibility**
- Added Device Authorization Grant (RFC 8628) for CLI/headless logins.
- Nuked the three separate dashboards. We now have a clean App Ecosystem + App Leaderboard.
- BYOP apps now track attribution properly via Tinybird.

🧹 **De-corporatizing the UI**
- Toned down the "earning" language. We're an open-source hackerspace, not a side-hustle bootcamp. The Play page description reflects that now.

Shoutout to the community for shipping over 30 new apps this week. Go build something weird.
